Uganda Electricity Transmission Network

Metadata last updated on Jan 19, 2023

Data for medium and high voltage transmission lines in Uganda. The data were compiled for
the AICD study led by the World Bank. A variety of sources were consulted, including regional power pool documents
and maps from World Bank project documents.
